subcodes.first_line: A remembrance which We have sent down in truth - and verily it is the Most Great Sign unto the peoples of the world and the Salsabil of Life unto those who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر انزلناه بالحق و انه لایه الکبری لاهل الوری و سلسبیل الحیوان لمن فی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @call to action
